meaning: 特兰托[意大利北部城市]
examples: Sophisticated and traditional cooking from the area near Trento - a total mix of Austrian, Swiss and Italian style.
University of Trento, a young, medium sized institution in a human-scale city that offers an excellent quality of life.
Visiting scholar(1996-1997), Rome University(Tor Vergata), Italy. Advanced visiting scholar(2002), Trento University, Italy.
The accident took place in the Fiemme Valley, in the province of Trento.
